in Weekly Demolition Reports 23/12/2023
As the holiday season of Christmas and New Year draws near, we extend our heartfelt wishes to our esteemed readers for a joyous Christmas and a prosperous New Year. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
As the holiday season of Christmas and New Year draws near, we extend our heartfelt wishes to our esteemed readers for a joyous Christmas and a
prosperous New Year. The ship recycling industry has exhibited a sluggish pace of activity across all destinations.
